speedometer:config.title: Config screen
speedometer:config.general.color.desr: Default color used in the absence of speed
speedometer:config.general.color1.desr: Color displayed at a speed of 80+ m/s
speedometer:config.general.color2.desr: Color displayed at a speed of 100+ m/s
speedometer:config.general.dilay.desr:
How often the speedometer should update its value (in ticks).
§c1§f - the fastest speed (not desirable)
§210§f - moderate speed (recommended)
§620§f - slow update (at your discretion)
